curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Patch commit a79b65c adds bounds checks (count > xsize) to the expandrow and expandrow2 functions in src/libImaging/SgiRleDecode.c. Only 1 non-test source file was changed. Locations derived directly from the patch diff and confirmed by the advisory description which names libImaging/SgiRleDecode.c. Sibling RLE decoders (SunRleDecode.c, TgaRleDecode.c) were checked but do not share the same vulnerability pattern — TgaRleDecode.c already has its own bounds check. L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2 by naming the SGI format explicitly. Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow confirmed from CWE-120 and the patch diff.
